title: Incident Response Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger incident response foundations judgment so legal / risk work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Incident Response Foundations is a leverage point inside legal / risk. It supports the broader goal of contracts, ip, privacy, liabilities, and regulatory awareness.
coreConcepts: Incident Response Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good incident response foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Incident Response Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
